title: The Way You Look Tonight
album: Days Of Wine And Roses, Moon River And Other Academy Award Winners
why_this_song: The Way You Look Tonight by Frank Sinatra (1964) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 5 times; first heard in: "And the way you look tonight"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Yes, you're lovely, with your smile so warm"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "And that laugh wrinkles your nose"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "And that laugh wrinkles your nose"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And the way you look tonight
Yes, you're lovely, with your smile so warm
There is nothing for me but to love you
Won't you please arrange it? 'Cause I love you
Just the way you look tonight

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tonight" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "tonight" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "lovely" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Some day, when I'm awfully low
With each word your tenderness grows
Just the way you look tonight

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "The Way You Look Tonight" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "The Way You Look Tonight" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
